quests.name: A New Beginning
quests.description: Speak with the village elder to learn about your destiny.
quests.startDialogue: Welcome, traveler! I've been expecting you. Dark times are upon us, and you may be our only hope.
quests.completionDialogue: Ah, you've returned! I knew you were special. Take this and seek out the forest ruins to the north.

quests.name: Into the Wild
quests.description: Clear the goblins from the eastern trail so merchants can travel safely.
quests.startDialogue: The eastern trail has been overrun by goblins! Clear them out and I'll reward you.
quests.completionDialogue: You've done it! The trail is safe once more. Thank you, brave adventurer!

quests.name: Gathering Materials
quests.description: Collect iron ore for the village blacksmith.
quests.startDialogue: I need iron ore to forge weapons. Bring me 5 pieces and I'll pay you well.
quests.completionDialogue: Perfect ore! This will make fine weapons. Here's your payment.

quests.name: Wolf Problem
quests.description: The eastern trail is plagued by dire wolves. Thin their numbers.
quests.startDialogue: Dire wolves attack travelers on the trail. Kill 5 of them and we'll be safe.
quests.completionDialogue: The wolves have returned to the forest. You're a true hero!

quests.name: Spider Infestation
quests.description: Giant spiders have been seen in the caves south of town. Clear them out.
quests.startDialogue: The cave spiders are threatening the village! Please eliminate them.
quests.completionDialogue: You've freed us from that menace! Accept this reward with our gratitude.

quests.name: Explore the Ruins
quests.description: Visit the ancient ruins to the north and report what you find.
quests.startDialogue: Those ancient ruins hold secrets. Go there and learn what you can.
quests.completionDialogue: Fascinating! The ruins still stand? This is valuable information.

objectives.description: Report back to Village Elder Marcus about the Ancient Ruins

quests.name: Rise to Level 5
quests.description: Prove your worth by reaching level 5.
quests.startDialogue: Grow stronger to defend against the darkness. Reach level 5 and return.
quests.completionDialogue: I sense great power within you. The village is safe with you here.

quests.name: Dark Forces
quests.description: Investigate reports of cultists near the old mine.
quests.startDialogue: Cultists have been seen near the abandoned mine. Find out what they're planning.
quests.completionDialogue: You've uncovered a sinister plot. We must prepare for battle!

quests.name: The Hunt Begins
quests.description: A legendary beast stalks the northern forest. Hunt it down.
quests.startDialogue: A great dire wolf has been terrorizing the hunters. Find and slay this beast!
quests.completionDialogue: The Great Wolf is slain! Your name will be legendary!

quests.name: Arming the Militia
quests.description: The village needs weapons. Craft or gather 3 iron swords.
quests.startDialogue: We need to arm our defenders. Bring me 3 iron swords.
quests.completionDialogue: Now our people can defend themselves. Thank you!
